subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Although I have no time, and tribulations and burdens encompass me from all directions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران ایزدی هر چند فرصتی ندارم و زحمت و کلفت از جمیع جهات مستولی با وجود
subcodes.subjects: @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
